password=Welcome1234

password=Qwerty@5678

password=toor

password=Admin123!

password=Database#99

password=Ftp$ecure22

password=DevMode#2024

# Database credentials (fake)
db_host=192.168.1.100
db_user=appuser
db_password=AppDb@2024!
db_name=production_db

# API Keys (fake)
stripe_key=sk_live_51HGfakeKEYabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz
aws_access_key=AKIAFAKEKEY1234567890
aws_secret_key=FakeSecretKey+abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz

# SSH Keys (placeholder)
